changes_made: Removed ooxml.md (610+ lines) - not needed for create/extract tasks
Removed ooxml/ directory (35 XSD schemas, scripts) - not needed
Removed scripts/ directory (document.py, utilities.py, templates) - not needed
Condensed docx-js.md from 350+ lines to ~80 lines with complete working example
Rewrote SKILL.md from 196 lines to ~90 lines focused on create and extract workflows
Added explicit warnings: never read .docx directly, never use python3 -c for multiline code
Added two-step extraction workflow: explore.py then extract.py
Added complete Python extraction script template with common parsing patterns
Reduced total skill size from 59 files to 2 files
notes: devstral-small shows extremely high variance on openclaw. The same skill version can score 90 or 0 on the same task across runs. The model frequently: (1) reads .docx files directly despite warnings, (2) uses python3 -c for multiline code causing syntax errors, (3) enters infinite retry loops on failed commands, (4) halluccinates data after seeing binary output. The baseline (unoptimized) skill achieved the best combined score (90+55=145). Optimization focused on reducing context size and adding guardrails, but devstral-small's limited instruction-following ability means it often ignores skill guidance.
